I understand the page break CSS isn't working. This is likely because the PDF export utility needs to be configured to respect CSS page breaks. Let me check the current PDF export utility and update it to handle page breaks properly.


I see the issue. The current PDF export utility uses `html2canvas` which converts the entire component to a single image, so CSS page breaks don't work. I need to update the export utility to properly handle page breaks by detecting page boundaries and creating multiple pages. Let me update it:


```typescript
// Ensure this file is recognized as a module
export {}; 

import jsPDF from 'jspdf';
import html2canvas from 'html2canvas';

export async function exportComponentAsPDF(element: HTMLElement, filename: string = 'document.pdf') {
  // A4 size in points (jsPDF default)
  const a4WidthPt = 595.28;
  const a4HeightPt = 841.89;
  
  // A4 size in pixels (assuming 96 DPI)
  const a4WidthPx = 794; // A4 width in pixels at 96 DPI
  const a4HeightPx = 1123; // A4 height in pixels at 96 DPI

  const pdf = new jsPDF({
    orientation: 'portrait',
    unit: 'pt',
    format: 'a4'
  });

  // Find all elements with page break styles
  const pageBreakElements = element.querySelectorAll('[style*="page-break-before: always"], [style*="pageBreakBefore: always"]');
  
  if (pageBreakElements.length > 0) {
    // Handle page breaks by processing sections separately
    await exportWithPageBreaks(element, pdf, a4WidthPx, a4HeightPx, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
  } else {
    // Fallback to original method for simple documents
    await exportSimpleDocument(element, pdf, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
  }

  pdf.save(filename);
}

async function exportWithPageBreaks(
  element: HTMLElement, 
  pdf: jsPDF, 
  a4WidthPx: number, 
  a4HeightPx: number, 
  a4WidthPt: number, 
  a4HeightPt: number
) {
  // Clone the element to work with
  const clonedElement = element.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement;
  
  // Set the width to A4 width for consistent rendering
  clonedElement.style.width = `${a4WidthPx}px`;
  clonedElement.style.position = 'absolute';
  clonedElement.style.left = '-9999px';
  clonedElement.style.top = '0';
  document.body.appendChild(clonedElement);

  try {
    // Find all page break sections
    const sections: HTMLElement[] = [];
    let currentSection: HTMLElement | null = null;
    
    // Group elements into sections based on page breaks
    for (const child of Array.from(clonedElement.children)) {
      const childElement = child as HTMLElement;
      const style = window.getComputedStyle(childElement);
      
      if (style.pageBreakBefore === 'always' || childElement.style.pageBreakBefore === 'always') {
        if (currentSection) {
          sections.push(currentSection);
        }
        currentSection = childElement;
      } else {
        if (currentSection) {
          currentSection.appendChild(childElement.cloneNode(true));
        } else {
          currentSection = childElement;
        }
      }
    }
    
    if (currentSection) {
      sections.push(currentSection);
    }

    // Process each section
    for (let i = 0; i < sections.length; i++) {
      const section = sections[i];
      
      // Add new page for all sections except the first
      if (i > 0) {
        pdf.addPage();
      }

      // Render section to canvas
      const canvas = await html2canvas(section, {
        scale: 2,
        useCORS: true,
        backgroundColor: '#fff',
        width: a4WidthPx,
        height: section.scrollHeight,
        scrollX: 0,
        scrollY: 0
      });

      const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
      
      // Calculate dimensions to fit on A4
      const imgProps = {
        width: canvas.width,
        height: canvas.height
      };
      
      const pdfWidth = a4WidthPt;
      const pdfHeight = (imgProps.height * pdfWidth) / imgProps.width;
      
      // If section is taller than A4, split it into multiple pages
      if (pdfHeight > a4HeightPt) {
        await splitSectionAcrossPages(section, pdf, a4WidthPx, a4HeightPx, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
      } else {
        pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
      }
    }
  } finally {
    // Clean up
    document.body.removeChild(clonedElement);
  }
}

async function splitSectionAcrossPages(
  section: HTMLElement, 
  pdf: jsPDF, 
  a4WidthPx: number, 
  a4HeightPx: number, 
  a4WidthPt: number, 
  a4HeightPt: number
) {
  const sectionHeight = section.scrollHeight;
  const pagesNeeded = Math.ceil(sectionHeight / a4HeightPx);
  
  for (let page = 0; page < pagesNeeded; page++) {
    if (page > 0) {
      pdf.addPage();
    }
    
    // Create a viewport for this page
    const startY = page * a4HeightPx;
    const endY = Math.min((page + 1) * a4HeightPx, sectionHeight);
    
    // Create a temporary container for this page's content
    const pageContainer = section.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement;
    pageContainer.style.height = `${a4HeightPx}px`;
    pageContainer.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    pageContainer.style.position = 'relative';
    pageContainer.style.top = `-${startY}px`;
    
    // Render this page
    const canvas = await html2canvas(pageContainer, {
      scale: 2,
      useCORS: true,
      backgroundColor: '#fff',
      width: a4WidthPx,
      height: a4HeightPx,
      scrollX: 0,
      scrollY: 0
    });

    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
    pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
  }
}

async function exportSimpleDocument(element: HTMLElement, pdf: jsPDF, a4WidthPt: number, a4HeightPt: number) {
  // Original method for simple documents
  const canvas = await html2canvas(element, {
    scale: 2,
    useCORS: true,
    backgroundColor: '#fff'
  });
  const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');

  const imgProps = {
    width: canvas.width,
    height: canvas.height
  };
  const pdfWidth = a4WidthPt;
  const pdfHeight = (imgProps.height * pdfWidth) / imgProps.width;

  pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
}
```

Let me try a different approach. The issue might be that the CSS page break properties aren't being recognized. Let me update the template to use a different method for page breaks:


```typescriptreact
import React from 'react';
import { Quotation } from '../../../types';

interface PdfDetailedTemplateProps {
  quotation: Quotation;
}

const PdfDetailedTemplate: React.FC<PdfDetailedTemplateProps> = ({ quotation }) => {
  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'INR',
      minimumFractionDigits: 2
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-IN', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  const calculateRoundOff = (amount: number) => {
    const rounded = Math.round(amount);
    return rounded - amount;
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 via-blue-50 to-indigo-100 p-6 font-serif" style={{ fontFamily: 'Georgia, Times New Roman, Times, serif' }}>
      <div className="mx-auto" style={{ width: '95%' }}>
        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
          {/* Page 1: Header */}
          <div data-page-break="after" className="bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-800 via-blue-800 to-indigo-900 text-white p-8">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
              <div className="flex-1">
                <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold tracking-wider mb-5" style={{ letterSpacing: '0.1em' }}>QUOTATION</h1>
                <div className="w-24 h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-400 to-cyan-400 rounded-full mb-4"></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Page 2: Company Information */}
          <div data-page-break="after" className="p-8 bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-50 to-blue-50 border-b border-gray-200">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm border border-gray-200">
                <div className="flex items-center mb-4">
                  <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-blue-600 rounded-full mr-3"></div>
                  <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-800">From: Your Company</h2>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2 text-gray-700">
                  <p className="font-semibold text-lg">Your Company Name</p>
                  <p>123 Business Street, Suite 100</p>
                  <p>City, State 12345</p>
                  <p className="text-blue-600 font-medium">+91-98765-43210</p>
                  <p className="text-blue-600 font-medium">info@yourcompany.com</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">GST: 27ABCDE1234F1Z5</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <div className="bg-white rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm border border-gray-200">
                <div className="flex items-center mb-4">
                  <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-green-600 rounded-full mr-3"></div>
                  <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-800">To: Client Information</h2>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2 text-gray-700">
                  <p className="font-semibold text-lg">{quotation.customer?.name || 'Client Name'}</p>
                  {quotation.customer?.site_address && <p>{quotation.customer.site_address}</p>}
                  {quotation.customer?.phone && <p className="text-green-600 font-medium">{quotation.customer.phone}</p>}
                  {quotation.customer?.email && <p className="text-green-600 font-medium">{quotation.customer.email}</p>}
                  {quotation.customer?.gst_number && <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">GST: {quotation.customer.gst_number}</p>}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Page 3: Quotation Details */}
          <div data-page-break="after" className="p-8">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-8">
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-pink-50 rounded-lg p-4 border border-purple-200">
                <div className="text-sm text-purple-600 font-medium mb-1">Quotation Number</div>
                <div className="text-xl font-bold text-purple-800">{quotation.quotation_number}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-50 to-red-50 rounded-lg p-4 border border-orange-200">
                <div className="text-sm text-orange-600 font-medium mb-1">Quotation Date</div>
                <div className="text-xl font-bold text-orange-800">{formatDate(quotation.created_at)}</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Summary Statistics */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-8">
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 rounded-lg p-4 text-center border border-blue-200">
                <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-800">{quotation.rooms?.length || 0}</div>
                <div className="text-sm text-blue-600 font-medium">Total Rooms</div>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-emerald-50 rounded-lg p-4 text-center border border-green-200">
                <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-800">{quotation.rooms?.reduce((sum, room) => sum + room.items.length, 0) || 0}</div>
                <div className="text-sm text-green-600 font-medium">Total Products</div>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-violet-50 rounded-lg p-4 text-center border border-purple-200">
                <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-purple-800">{quotation.rooms?.reduce((sum, room) => sum + room.items.reduce((itemSum, item) => itemSum + (item.quantity_boxes || 0), 0), 0) || 0}</div>
                <div className="text-sm text-purple-600 font-medium">Total Boxes</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Page 4: Detailed Products Table */}
          <div data-page-break="after" className="p-8">
            <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 text-slate-800 flex items-center">
              <div className="w-3 h-10 bg-gradient-to-b from-blue-600 to-indigo-700 rounded mr-4"></div>
              Detailed Product Specifications
            </h3>
            
            {quotation.rooms && quotation.rooms.length > 0 && quotation.rooms.some(room => room.items && room.items.length > 0) ? (
              <div className="space-y-6">
                {quotation.rooms.map((room, roomIndex) => (
                  <div key={roomIndex} className="border-2 border-gray-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-lg" data-page-break-inside="avoid">
                    <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-700 to-slate-800 text-white p-4">
                      <h4 className="text-xl font-bold flex items-center">
                        <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-white rounded-full mr-3"></div>
                        Room {roomIndex + 1}: {room.room_name}
                      </h4>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                      <table className="w-full text-sm">
                        <thead>
                          <tr className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-700 text-white">
                            <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-left">Product Details</th>
                            <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-left">Size & Surface</th>
                            {quotation.show_sqft_in_box && (
                              <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-center">SQFT/Box</th>
                            )}
                            {quotation.show_sqft_needed && (
                              <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-center">SQFT Needed</th>
                            )}
                            {quotation.show_box_needed && (
                              <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-center">Boxes Needed</th>
                            )}
                            <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-center">Quantity</th>
                            {quotation.show_price_per_sqft && (
                              <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-right">Price/SQFT</th>
                            )}
                            {quotation.show_price_per_box && (
                              <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-right">Price/Box</th>
                            )}
                            {quotation.show_amount && (
                              <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-right">Amount</th>
                            )}
                          </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                          {room.items.map((item, itemIndex) => (
                            <tr key={itemIndex} className={itemIndex % 2 === 0 ? "bg-white" : "bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-50 to-blue-50"} data-page-break-inside="avoid">
                              <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top">
                                <div className="space-y-1">
                                  <div className="font-bold text-blue-900 text-base">{item.product?.design_name || 'Unknown Product'}</div>
                                  {item.product?.collection && (
                                    <div className="text-sm text-purple-600 font-medium">Collection: {item.product.collection}</div>
                                  )}
                                </div>
                              </td>
                              <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top">
                                <div className="space-y-1">
                                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-700">
                                    <span className="font-medium">Size:</span> {item.product?.size || '-'}
                                  </div>
                                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-700">
                                    <span className="font-medium">Surface:</span> {item.product?.surface || 'Standard'}
                                  </div>
                                </div>
                              </td>
                              {quotation.show_sqft_in_box && (
                                <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-center">
                                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-green-700">
                                    {quotation.sqft_in_box_type === 'actual'
                                      ? item.product?.actual_sqft_per_box.toFixed(2)
                                      : item.product?.billed_sqft_per_box.toFixed(2)
                                    }
                                  </div>
                                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">({quotation.sqft_in_box_type})</div>
                                </td>
                              )}
                              {quotation.show_sqft_needed && (
                                <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-center">
                                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-orange-700">{item.sqft_needed?.toFixed(2)}</div>
                                </td>
                              )}
                              {quotation.show_box_needed && (
                                <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-center">
                                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-purple-700">{item.box_needed?.toFixed(2)}</div>
                                </td>
                              )}
                              <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-center">
                                <div className="text-lg font-bold text-blue-800">{item.quantity_boxes}</div>
                                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">boxes</div>
                              </td>
                              {quotation.show_price_per_sqft && (
                                <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-right">
                                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-green-700">{formatCurrency(item.rate_per_sqft)}</div>
                                </td>
                              )}
                              {quotation.show_price_per_box && (
                                <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-right">
                                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-indigo-700">{formatCurrency(item.mrp_per_box)}</div>
                                </td>
                              )}
                              {quotation.show_amount && (
                                <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-right">
                                  <div className="text-base font-bold text-blue-900 bg-blue-50 px-2 py-1 rounded">
                                    {formatCurrency(item.amount || 0)}
                                  </div>
                                </td>
                              )}
                            </tr>
                          ))}
                        </tbody>
                      </table>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center py-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-blue-50 rounded-lg border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300">
                <div className="text-6xl mb-4">📋</div>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">No products added to this quotation</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Page 5: Financial Summary */}
          <div data-page-break="before" data-page-break="after" className="p-8">
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-emerald-50 rounded-lg p-6 border border-green-200 max-w-md ml-auto">
              <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4 text-green-800 flex items-center">
                <div className="w-2 h-6 bg-green-600 rounded mr-3"></div>
                Financial Summary
              </h3>
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div className="flex justify-between py-2 border-b border-green-200">
                  <span className="text-gray-700">Subtotal:</span>
                  <span className="font-semibold text-green-800">{formatCurrency(quotation.total_amount || 0)}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex justify-between py-2 border-b border-green-200">
                  <span className="text-gray-700">Round Off:</span>
                  <span className="font-semibold text-green-800">{formatCurrency(calculateRoundOff(quotation.total_amount || 0))}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex justify-between py-3 bg-green-100 rounded-lg px-3">
                  <span className="text-lg font-bold text-green-900">Grand Total:</span>
                  <span className="text-lg font-bold text-green-900">{formatCurrency(Math.round(quotation.total_amount || 0))}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Page 6: Terms & Conditions */}
          <div data-page-break="before" className="p-8">
            <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4 text-slate-800 flex items-center">
              <div className="w-2 h-6 bg-orange-600 rounded mr-3"></div>
              Terms & Conditions
            </h3>
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-50 to-amber-50 p-6 rounded-lg border border-orange-200">
              <div className="text-gray-700 leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-wrap">
                {quotation.terms_conditions ? (
                  quotation.terms_conditions
                ) : (
                  <div className="text-gray-500 italic">
                    <p>• Prices are valid for 30 days from the quotation date</p>
                    <p>• Payment terms: 50% advance, balance before delivery</p>
                    <p>• Delivery timeline: 7-10 business days after confirmation</p>
                    <p>• Installation charges are not included unless specified</p>
                    <p>• Warranty: 10 years on manufacturing defects</p>
                    <p>• Returns accepted within 7 days in original packaging</p>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Footer */}
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-800 to-slate-900 text-white p-6 rounded-lg text-center mt-8">
              <p className="text-xl font-bold mb-2">Thank you for choosing our services!</p>
              <p className="text-slate-300 mb-4">We look forward to working with you on this project.</p>
              <div className="w-20 h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-400 to-cyan-400 mx-auto rounded-full"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default PdfDetailedTemplate;
```

Now I need to update the PDF export utility to handle these data attributes properly:


```typescript
// Ensure this file is recognized as a module
export {}; 

import jsPDF from 'jspdf';
import html2canvas from 'html2canvas';

export async function exportComponentAsPDF(element: HTMLElement, filename: string = 'document.pdf') {
  // A4 size in points (jsPDF default)
  const a4WidthPt = 595.28;
  const a4HeightPt = 841.89;
  
  // A4 size in pixels (assuming 96 DPI)
  const a4WidthPx = 794; // A4 width in pixels at 96 DPI
  const a4HeightPx = 1123; // A4 height in pixels at 96 DPI

  const pdf = new jsPDF({
    orientation: 'portrait',
    unit: 'pt',
    format: 'a4'
  });

  // Find all elements with page break data attributes
  const pageBreakElements = element.querySelectorAll('[data-page-break]');
  
  if (pageBreakElements.length > 0) {
    // Handle page breaks by processing sections separately
    await exportWithPageBreaks(element, pdf, a4WidthPx, a4HeightPx, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
  } else {
    // Fallback to original method for simple documents
    await exportSimpleDocument(element, pdf, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
  }

  pdf.save(filename);
}

async function exportWithPageBreaks(
  element: HTMLElement, 
  pdf: jsPDF, 
  a4WidthPx: number, 
  a4HeightPx: number, 
  a4WidthPt: number, 
  a4HeightPt: number
) {
  // Clone the element to work with
  const clonedElement = element.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement;
  
  // Set the width to A4 width for consistent rendering
  clonedElement.style.width = `${a4WidthPx}px`;
  clonedElement.style.position = 'absolute';
  clonedElement.style.left = '-9999px';
  clonedElement.style.top = '0';
  document.body.appendChild(clonedElement);

  try {
    // Find all page break sections
    const sections: HTMLElement[] = [];
    let currentSection: HTMLElement | null = null;
    
    // Group elements into sections based on page breaks
    for (const child of Array.from(clonedElement.children)) {
      const childElement = child as HTMLElement;
      const pageBreakAttr = childElement.getAttribute('data-page-break');
      
      if (pageBreakAttr && (pageBreakAttr.includes('before') || pageBreakAttr.includes('after'))) {
        if (currentSection) {
          sections.push(currentSection);
        }
        currentSection = childElement;
      } else {
        if (currentSection) {
          currentSection.appendChild(childElement.cloneNode(true));
        } else {
          currentSection = childElement;
        }
      }
    }
    
    if (currentSection) {
      sections.push(currentSection);
    }

    // Process each section
    for (let i = 0; i < sections.length; i++) {
      const section = sections[i];
      
      // Add new page for all sections except the first
      if (i > 0) {
        pdf.addPage();
      }

      // Render section to canvas
      const canvas = await html2canvas(section, {
        scale: 2,
        useCORS: true,
        backgroundColor: '#fff',
        width: a4WidthPx,
        height: section.scrollHeight,
        scrollX: 0,
        scrollY: 0
      });

      const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
      
      // Calculate dimensions to fit on A4
      const imgProps = {
        width: canvas.width,
        height: canvas.height
      };
      
      const pdfWidth = a4WidthPt;
      const pdfHeight = (imgProps.height * pdfWidth) / imgProps.width;
      
      // If section is taller than A4, split it into multiple pages
      if (pdfHeight > a4HeightPt) {
        await splitSectionAcrossPages(section, pdf, a4WidthPx, a4HeightPx, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
      } else {
        pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
      }
    }
  } finally {
    // Clean up
    document.body.removeChild(clonedElement);
  }
}

async function splitSectionAcrossPages(
  section: HTMLElement, 
  pdf: jsPDF, 
  a4WidthPx: number, 
  a4HeightPx: number, 
  a4WidthPt: number, 
  a4HeightPt: number
) {
  const sectionHeight = section.scrollHeight;
  const pagesNeeded = Math.ceil(sectionHeight / a4HeightPx);
  
  for (let page = 0; page < pagesNeeded; page++) {
    if (page > 0) {
      pdf.addPage();
    }
    
    // Create a viewport for this page
    const startY = page * a4HeightPx;
    const endY = Math.min((page + 1) * a4HeightPx, sectionHeight);
    
    // Create a temporary container for this page's content
    const pageContainer = section.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement;
    pageContainer.style.height = `${a4HeightPx}px`;
    pageContainer.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    pageContainer.style.position = 'relative';
    pageContainer.style.top = `-${startY}px`;
    
    // Render this page
    const canvas = await html2canvas(pageContainer, {
      scale: 2,
      useCORS: true,
      backgroundColor: '#fff',
      width: a4WidthPx,
      height: a4HeightPx,
      scrollX: 0,
      scrollY: 0
    });

    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
    pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
  }
}

async function exportSimpleDocument(element: HTMLElement, pdf: jsPDF, a4WidthPt: number, a4HeightPt: number) {
  // Original method for simple documents
  const canvas = await html2canvas(element, {
    scale: 2,
    useCORS: true,
    backgroundColor: '#fff'
  });
  const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');

  const imgProps = {
    width: canvas.width,
    height: canvas.height
  };
  const pdfWidth = a4WidthPt;
  const pdfHeight = (imgProps.height * pdfWidth) / imgProps.width;

  pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
}
```

Perfect! Now I've implemented a comprehensive solution for page breaks in the PDF export:

## What I've Done:

1. **Updated the Template**: 
   - Replaced CSS `pageBreakAfter` and `pageBreakBefore` with `data-page-break` attributes
   - Added clear page structure with comments (Page 1, Page 2, etc.)
   - Used `data-page-break-inside="avoid"` for table rows and room sections

2. **Enhanced the PDF Export Utility**:
   - Added detection for `data-page-break` attributes
   - Implemented logic to split content into separate sections based on page breaks
   - Added support for both `before` and `after` page breaks
   - Included fallback to original method for simple documents

## Page Structure:
- **Page 1**: Header (QUOTATION title)
- **Page 2**: Company Information (From/To sections)
- **Page 3**: Quotation Details (Number, Date, Statistics)
- **Page 4**: Detailed Products Table
- **Page 5**: Financial Summary (starts on new page)
- **Page 6**: Terms & Conditions + Footer (starts on new page)

## How It Works:
1. The export utility detects elements with `data-page-break` attributes
2. It groups content into sections based on these attributes
3. Each section is rendered separately to a canvas
4. If a section is too tall for one page, it's automatically split across multiple pages
5. Each section becomes a separate page in the PDF

This should now properly handle page breaks and ensure that complete sections (like the financial summary) move to new pages instead of being cut off.

```typescript
// Ensure this file is recognized as a module
export {}; 

import jsPDF from 'jspdf';
import html2canvas from 'html2canvas';

export async function exportComponentAsPDF(element: HTMLElement, filename: string = 'document.pdf') {
  try {
    // A4 size in points (jsPDF default)
    const a4WidthPt = 595.28;
    const a4HeightPt = 841.89;
    
    // A4 size in pixels (assuming 96 DPI)
    const a4WidthPx = 794; // A4 width in pixels at 96 DPI

    const pdf = new jsPDF({
      orientation: 'portrait',
      unit: 'pt',
      format: 'a4'
    });

    // Find all elements with page break data attributes
    const pageBreakElements = element.querySelectorAll('[data-page-break]');
    
    if (pageBreakElements.length > 0) {
      // Handle page breaks by processing sections separately
      await exportWithPageBreaks(element, pdf, a4WidthPx, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
    } else {
      // Fallback to original method for simple documents
      await exportSimpleDocument(element, pdf, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
    }

    pdf.save(filename);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('PDF generation failed:', error);
    // Fallback to simple export if complex method fails
    try {
      await exportSimpleDocument(element, new jsPDF({ orientation: 'portrait', unit: 'pt', format: 'a4' }), 595.28, 841.89);
    } catch (fallbackError) {
      console.error('Fallback PDF generation also failed:', fallbackError);
      throw new Error('Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.');
    }
  }
}

async function exportWithPageBreaks(
  element: HTMLElement, 
  pdf: jsPDF, 
  a4WidthPx: number, 
  a4WidthPt: number, 
  a4HeightPt: number
) {
  // Clone the element to work with
  const clonedElement = element.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement;
  
  // Set the width to A4 width for consistent rendering
  clonedElement.style.width = `${a4WidthPx}px`;
  clonedElement.style.position = 'absolute';
  clonedElement.style.left = '-9999px';
  clonedElement.style.top = '0';
  clonedElement.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff';
  document.body.appendChild(clonedElement);

  try {
    // Find all page break sections
    const sections: HTMLElement[] = [];
    let currentSection: HTMLElement | null = null;
    
    // Group elements into sections based on page breaks
    for (const child of Array.from(clonedElement.children)) {
      const childElement = child as HTMLElement;
      const pageBreakAttr = childElement.getAttribute('data-page-break');
      
      if (pageBreakAttr && (pageBreakAttr.includes('before') || pageBreakAttr.includes('after'))) {
        if (currentSection) {
          sections.push(currentSection);
        }
        currentSection = childElement;
      } else {
        if (currentSection) {
          currentSection.appendChild(childElement.cloneNode(true));
        } else {
          currentSection = childElement;
        }
      }
    }
    
    if (currentSection) {
      sections.push(currentSection);
    }

    // Process each section
    for (let i = 0; i < sections.length; i++) {
      const section = sections[i];
      
      // Add new page for all sections except the first
      if (i > 0) {
        pdf.addPage();
      }

      try {
        // Render section to canvas with more conservative settings
        const canvas = await html2canvas(section, {
          scale: 1.5, // Reduced scale for better performance
          useCORS: true,
          backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
          width: a4WidthPx,
          height: section.scrollHeight,
          scrollX: 0,
          scrollY: 0,
          allowTaint: true,
          foreignObjectRendering: false
        });

        const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png', 0.8); // Reduced quality for better performance
        
        // Calculate dimensions to fit on A4
        const imgProps = {
          width: canvas.width,
          height: canvas.height
        };
        
        const pdfWidth = a4WidthPt;
        const pdfHeight = (imgProps.height * pdfWidth) / imgProps.width;
        
        // If section is taller than A4, split it into multiple pages
        if (pdfHeight > a4HeightPt) {
          await splitSectionAcrossPages(section, pdf, a4WidthPx, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
        } else {
          pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
        }
      } catch (sectionError) {
        console.error(`Error processing section ${i}:`, sectionError);
        // Continue with next section instead of failing completely
        continue;
      }
    }
  } finally {
    // Clean up
    if (document.body.contains(clonedElement)) {
      document.body.removeChild(clonedElement);
    }
  }
}

async function splitSectionAcrossPages(
  section: HTMLElement, 
  pdf: jsPDF, 
  a4WidthPx: number, 
  a4WidthPt: number, 
  a4HeightPt: number
) {
  const sectionHeight = section.scrollHeight;
  const a4HeightPx = 1123; // A4 height in pixels
  const pagesNeeded = Math.ceil(sectionHeight / a4HeightPx);
  
  for (let page = 0; page < pagesNeeded; page++) {
    if (page > 0) {
      pdf.addPage();
    }
    
    try {
      // Create a viewport for this page
      const startY = page * a4HeightPx;
      const endY = Math.min((page + 1) * a4HeightPx, sectionHeight);
      
      // Create a temporary container for this page's content
      const pageContainer = section.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement;
      pageContainer.style.height = `${a4HeightPx}px`;
      pageContainer.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      pageContainer.style.position = 'relative';
      pageContainer.style.top = `-${startY}px`;
      pageContainer.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff';
      
      // Render this page
      const canvas = await html2canvas(pageContainer, {
        scale: 1.5,
        useCORS: true,
        backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
        width: a4WidthPx,
        height: a4HeightPx,
        scrollX: 0,
        scrollY: 0,
        allowTaint: true,
        foreignObjectRendering: false
      });

      const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png', 0.8);
      pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
    } catch (pageError) {
      console.error(`Error processing page ${page}:`, pageError);
      // Continue with next page instead of failing completely
      continue;
    }
  }
}

async function exportSimpleDocument(element: HTMLElement, pdf: jsPDF, a4WidthPt: number, a4HeightPt: number) {
  // Original method for simple documents
  const canvas = await html2canvas(element, {
    scale: 1.5,
    useCORS: true,
    backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
    allowTaint: true,
    foreignObjectRendering: false
  });
  const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png', 0.8);

  const imgProps = {
    width: canvas.width,
    height: canvas.height
  };
  const pdfWidth = a4WidthPt;
  const pdfHeight = (imgProps.height * pdfWidth) / imgProps.width;

  pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
}
```

I've made several improvements to make the PDF generation more robust:

## Key Improvements:

1. **Error Handling**: Added comprehensive try-catch blocks to handle failures gracefully
2. **Fallback Mechanism**: If the complex page break method fails, it falls back to the simple export method
3. **Performance Optimizations**: 
   - Reduced scale from 2 to 1.5 for better performance
   - Reduced image quality to 0.8 for faster processing
   - Added `allowTaint: true` and `foreignObjectRendering: false` for better compatibility
4. **Better Cleanup**: Added checks before removing elements to prevent errors
5. **Section Error Handling**: If one section fails, it continues with the next instead of failing completely

## What This Fixes:

- **Memory Issues**: Lower scale and quality reduce memory usage
- **Rendering Issues**: Better html2canvas options for compatibility
- **Error Recovery**: Multiple fallback mechanisms ensure PDF generation doesn't completely fail
- **Resource Cleanup**: Prevents DOM manipulation errors

The PDF should now generate successfully. If it still fails, the error handling will provide more specific information about what's going wrong, and the fallback method should still produce a working PDF even if the page break functionality doesn't work perfectly.

```typescript
// Ensure this file is recognized as a module
export {}; 

import jsPDF from 'jspdf';
import html2canvas from 'html2canvas';

export async function exportComponentAsPDF(element: HTMLElement, filename: string = 'document.pdf') {
  try {
    // A4 size in points (jsPDF default)
    const a4WidthPt = 595.28;
    const a4HeightPt = 841.89;

    const pdf = new jsPDF({
      orientation: 'portrait',
      unit: 'pt',
      format: 'a4'
    });

    // Find all elements with page break data attributes
    const pageBreakElements = element.querySelectorAll('[data-page-break]');
    
    if (pageBreakElements.length > 0) {
      // Handle page breaks by processing sections separately
      await exportWithPageBreaks(element, pdf, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
    } else {
      // Fallback to original method for simple documents
      await exportSimpleDocument(element, pdf, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
    }

    pdf.save(filename);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('PDF generation failed:', error);
    // Fallback to simple export if complex method fails
    try {
      await exportSimpleDocument(element, new jsPDF({ orientation: 'portrait', unit: 'pt', format: 'a4' }), 595.28, 841.89);
    } catch (fallbackError) {
      console.error('Fallback PDF generation also failed:', fallbackError);
      throw new Error('Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.');
    }
  }
}

async function exportWithPageBreaks(
  element: HTMLElement, 
  pdf: jsPDF, 
  a4WidthPt: number, 
  a4HeightPt: number
) {
  // Clone the element to work with
  const clonedElement = element.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement;
  
  // Set up the cloned element for rendering
  clonedElement.style.position = 'absolute';
  clonedElement.style.left = '-9999px';
  clonedElement.style.top = '0';
  clonedElement.style.width = '794px'; // A4 width in pixels
  clonedElement.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff';
  clonedElement.style.zIndex = '-1';
  
  // Add to DOM temporarily
  document.body.appendChild(clonedElement);

  try {
    // Wait a bit for the element to be rendered
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));

    // Find all page break sections
    const sections: HTMLElement[] = [];
    let currentSection: HTMLElement | null = null;
    
    // Group elements into sections based on page breaks
    for (const child of Array.from(clonedElement.children)) {
      const childElement = child as HTMLElement;
      const pageBreakAttr = childElement.getAttribute('data-page-break');
      
      if (pageBreakAttr && (pageBreakAttr.includes('before') || pageBreakAttr.includes('after'))) {
        if (currentSection) {
          sections.push(currentSection);
        }
        currentSection = childElement;
      } else {
        if (currentSection) {
          currentSection.appendChild(childElement.cloneNode(true));
        } else {
          currentSection = childElement;
        }
      }
    }
    
    if (currentSection) {
      sections.push(currentSection);
    }

    console.log(`Found ${sections.length} sections to process`);

    // Process each section
    for (let i = 0; i < sections.length; i++) {
      const section = sections[i];
      
      // Add new page for all sections except the first
      if (i > 0) {
        pdf.addPage();
      }

      try {
        console.log(`Processing section ${i + 1}/${sections.length}`);
        
        // Ensure section is visible and properly sized
        section.style.display = 'block';
        section.style.visibility = 'visible';
        section.style.opacity = '1';
        
        // Render section to canvas
        const canvas = await html2canvas(section, {
          scale: 1,
          useCORS: true,
          backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
          width: 794,
          height: section.scrollHeight || 1123,
          scrollX: 0,
          scrollY: 0,
          allowTaint: true,
          foreignObjectRendering: false,
          logging: true
        });

        console.log(`Canvas created for section ${i + 1}:`, canvas.width, 'x', canvas.height);

        const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png', 1.0);
        
        // Calculate dimensions to fit on A4
        const imgProps = {
          width: canvas.width,
          height: canvas.height
        };
        
        const pdfWidth = a4WidthPt;
        const pdfHeight = (imgProps.height * pdfWidth) / imgProps.width;
        
        console.log(`Adding image to PDF: ${pdfWidth} x ${pdfHeight}`);
        
        // If section is taller than A4, split it into multiple pages
        if (pdfHeight > a4HeightPt) {
          await splitSectionAcrossPages(section, pdf, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
        } else {
          pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
        }
      } catch (sectionError) {
        console.error(`Error processing section ${i}:`, sectionError);
        // Continue with next section instead of failing completely
        continue;
      }
    }
  } finally {
    // Clean up
    if (document.body.contains(clonedElement)) {
      document.body.removeChild(clonedElement);
    }
  }
}

async function splitSectionAcrossPages(
  section: HTMLElement, 
  pdf: jsPDF, 
  a4WidthPt: number, 
  a4HeightPt: number
) {
  const sectionHeight = section.scrollHeight || 1123;
  const a4HeightPx = 1123; // A4 height in pixels
  const pagesNeeded = Math.ceil(sectionHeight / a4HeightPx);
  
  console.log(`Splitting section across ${pagesNeeded} pages`);
  
  for (let page = 0; page < pagesNeeded; page++) {
    if (page > 0) {
      pdf.addPage();
    }
    
    try {
      // Create a viewport for this page
      const startY = page * a4HeightPx;
      const endY = Math.min((page + 1) * a4HeightPx, sectionHeight);
      
      // Create a temporary container for this page's content
      const pageContainer = section.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement;
      pageContainer.style.height = `${a4HeightPx}px`;
      pageContainer.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      pageContainer.style.position = 'relative';
      pageContainer.style.top = `-${startY}px`;
      pageContainer.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff';
      pageContainer.style.display = 'block';
      pageContainer.style.visibility = 'visible';
      
      // Render this page
      const canvas = await html2canvas(pageContainer, {
        scale: 1,
        useCORS: true,
        backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
        width: 794,
        height: a4HeightPx,
        scrollX: 0,
        scrollY: 0,
        allowTaint: true,
        foreignObjectRendering: false
      });

      const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png', 1.0);
      pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
    } catch (pageError) {
      console.error(`Error processing page ${page}:`, pageError);
      // Continue with next page instead of failing completely
      continue;
    }
  }
}

async function exportSimpleDocument(element: HTMLElement, pdf: jsPDF, a4WidthPt: number, a4HeightPt: number) {
  console.log('Using simple export method');
  
  // Ensure element is visible and properly sized
  const originalStyle = element.style.cssText;
  element.style.position = 'absolute';
  element.style.left = '-9999px';
  element.style.top = '0';
  element.style.width = '794px';
  element.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff';
  element.style.display = 'block';
  element.style.visibility = 'visible';
  
  try {
    // Wait for element to be rendered
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
    
    // Render element to canvas
    const canvas = await html2canvas(element, {
      scale: 1,
      useCORS: true,
      backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
      width: 794,
      height: element.scrollHeight || 1123,
      scrollX: 0,
      scrollY: 0,
      allowTaint: true,
      foreignObjectRendering: false,
      logging: true
    });

    console.log('Canvas created:', canvas.width, 'x', canvas.height);

    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png', 1.0);

    const imgProps = {
      width: canvas.width,
      height: canvas.height
    };
    const pdfWidth = a4WidthPt;
    const pdfHeight = (imgProps.height * pdfWidth) / imgProps.width;

    console.log('Adding image to PDF:', pdfWidth, 'x', pdfHeight);
    pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
  } finally {
    // Restore original styles
    element.style.cssText = originalStyle;
  }
}
```

I've made several key improvements to fix the blank PDF issue:

## Key Fixes:

1. **Proper Element Setup**: 
   - Added explicit visibility and display properties
   - Set proper width and background color
   - Added z-index to ensure proper layering

2. **Rendering Wait Time**: 
   - Added 100ms delay to ensure elements are fully rendered before capturing

3. **Better Canvas Settings**:
   - Set scale to 1 for better compatibility
   - Added explicit width and height parameters
   - Enabled logging for debugging
   - Set full quality (1.0) for image data

4. **Enhanced Debugging**:
   - Added console logs to track the process
   - Log canvas dimensions and PDF dimensions
   - Track section processing progress

5. **Style Management**:
   - Properly save and restore original element styles
   - Ensure elements are visible during capture

## What This Should Fix:

- **Blank Canvas**: Elements should now be properly visible and rendered
- **Missing Content**: Explicit visibility settings ensure content is captured
- **Rendering Issues**: Better html2canvas configuration for compatibility
- **Timing Issues**: Wait time ensures DOM is ready before capture

The console logs will help us see exactly what's happening during the PDF generation process. If it's still blank, the logs will show us where the process is failing.

---

**User**

the generated page is blank all 3 pages

---

**Cursor**

The issue is likely that the elements aren't being properly rendered or the page break logic is interfering. Let me simplify the approach and go back to a working method, then add page breaks in a simpler way.


```typescript
// Ensure this file is recognized as a module
export {}; 

import jsPDF from 'jspdf';
import html2canvas from 'html2canvas';

export async function exportComponentAsPDF(element: HTMLElement, filename: string = 'document.pdf') {
  try {
    // A4 size in points (jsPDF default)
    const a4WidthPt = 595.28;
    const a4HeightPt = 841.89;

    const pdf = new jsPDF({
      orientation: 'portrait',
      unit: 'pt',
      format: 'a4'
    });

    // Use the simple method first to ensure it works
    await exportSimpleDocument(element, pdf, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
    pdf.save(filename);
    
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('PDF generation failed:', error);
    throw new Error('Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.');
  }
}

async function exportSimpleDocument(element: HTMLElement, pdf: jsPDF, a4WidthPt: number, a4HeightPt: number) {
  console.log('Starting PDF export...');
  
  // Create a clone of the element to work with
  const clonedElement = element.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement;
  
  // Set up the cloned element for rendering
  clonedElement.style.position = 'absolute';
  clonedElement.style.left = '-9999px';
  clonedElement.style.top = '0';
  clonedElement.style.width = '794px'; // A4 width in pixels
  clonedElement.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff';
  clonedElement.style.display = 'block';
  clonedElement.style.visibility = 'visible';
  clonedElement.style.zIndex = '-1';
  
  // Add to DOM temporarily
  document.body.appendChild(clonedElement);

  try {
    // Wait for element to be rendered
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200));
    
    console.log('Element prepared, starting canvas capture...');
    
    // Render element to canvas
    const canvas = await html2canvas(clonedElement, {
      scale: 1,
      useCORS: true,
      backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
      width: 794,
      height: clonedElement.scrollHeight || 1123,
      scrollX: 0,
      scrollY: 0,
      allowTaint: true,
      foreignObjectRendering: false,
      logging: true
    });

    console.log('Canvas created:', canvas.width, 'x', canvas.height);

    const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png', 1.0);

    const imgProps = {
      width: canvas.width,
      height: canvas.height
    };
    const pdfWidth = a4WidthPt;
    const pdfHeight = (imgProps.height * pdfWidth) / imgProps.width;

    console.log('Adding image to PDF:', pdfWidth, 'x', pdfHeight);
    
    // If the content is taller than A4, split it into multiple pages
    if (pdfHeight > a4HeightPt) {
      await splitIntoMultiplePages(clonedElement, pdf, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
    } else {
      pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
    }
    
  } finally {
    // Clean up
    if (document.body.contains(clonedElement)) {
      document.body.removeChild(clonedElement);
    }
  }
}

async function splitIntoMultiplePages(
  element: HTMLElement, 
  pdf: jsPDF, 
  a4WidthPt: number, 
  a4HeightPt: number
) {
  const totalHeight = element.scrollHeight;
  const a4HeightPx = 1123; // A4 height in pixels
  const pagesNeeded = Math.ceil(totalHeight / a4HeightPx);
  
  console.log(`Splitting content across ${pagesNeeded} pages`);
  
  for (let page = 0; page < pagesNeeded; page++) {
    if (page > 0) {
      pdf.addPage();
    }
    
    try {
      // Create a viewport for this page
      const startY = page * a4HeightPx;
      const endY = Math.min((page + 1) * a4HeightPx, totalHeight);
      
      // Create a temporary container for this page's content
      const pageContainer = element.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement;
      pageContainer.style.height = `${a4HeightPx}px`;
      pageContainer.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      pageContainer.style.position = 'relative';
      pageContainer.style.top = `-${startY}px`;
      pageContainer.style.backgroundColor = '#ffffff';
      pageContainer.style.display = 'block';
      pageContainer.style.visibility = 'visible';
      
      console.log(`Rendering page ${page + 1}/${pagesNeeded}`);
      
      // Render this page
      const canvas = await html2canvas(pageContainer, {
        scale: 1,
        useCORS: true,
        backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
        width: 794,
        height: a4HeightPx,
        scrollX: 0,
        scrollY: 0,
        allowTaint: true,
        foreignObjectRendering: false
      });

      const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png', 1.0);
      pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, a4WidthPt, a4HeightPt);
      
      console.log(`Page ${page + 1} added to PDF`);
    } catch (pageError) {
      console.error(`Error processing page ${page}:`, pageError);
      // Continue with next page instead of failing completely
      continue;
    }
  }
}
```

I've simplified the PDF export to a basic working method. Now let me also remove the data-page-break attributes from the template since they're not being used and might be causing issues:


```typescriptreact
import React from 'react';
import { Quotation } from '../../../types';

interface PdfDetailedTemplateProps {
  quotation: Quotation;
}

const PdfDetailedTemplate: React.FC<PdfDetailedTemplateProps> = ({ quotation }) => {
  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'INR',
      minimumFractionDigits: 2
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-IN', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  const calculateRoundOff = (amount: number) => {
    const rounded = Math.round(amount);
    return rounded - amount;
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 via-blue-50 to-indigo-100 p-6 font-serif" style={{ fontFamily: 'Georgia, Times New Roman, Times, serif' }}>
      <div className="mx-auto" style={{ width: '95%' }}>
        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
          {/* Header */}
          <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-800 via-blue-800 to-indigo-900 text-white p-8">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
              <div className="flex-1">
                <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold tracking-wider mb-5" style={{ letterSpacing: '0.1em' }}>QUOTATION</h1>
                <div className="w-24 h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-400 to-cyan-400 rounded-full mb-4"></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Company Information */}
          <div className="p-8 bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-50 to-blue-50 border-b border-gray-200">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm border border-gray-200">
                <div className="flex items-center mb-4">
                  <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-blue-600 rounded-full mr-3"></div>
                  <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-800">From: Your Company</h2>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2 text-gray-700">
                  <p className="font-semibold text-lg">Your Company Name</p>
                  <p>123 Business Street, Suite 100</p>
                  <p>City, State 12345</p>
                  <p className="text-blue-600 font-medium">+91-98765-43210</p>
                  <p className="text-blue-600 font-medium">info@yourcompany.com</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">GST: 27ABCDE1234F1Z5</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <div className="bg-white rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm border border-gray-200">
                <div className="flex items-center mb-4">
                  <div className="w-3 h-3 bg-green-600 rounded-full mr-3"></div>
                  <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-800">To: Client Information</h2>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2 text-gray-700">
                  <p className="font-semibold text-lg">{quotation.customer?.name || 'Client Name'}</p>
                  {quotation.customer?.site_address && <p>{quotation.customer.site_address}</p>}
                  {quotation.customer?.phone && <p className="text-green-600 font-medium">{quotation.customer.phone}</p>}
                  {quotation.customer?.email && <p className="text-green-600 font-medium">{quotation.customer.email}</p>}
                  {quotation.customer?.gst_number && <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">GST: {quotation.customer.gst_number}</p>}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Quotation Details */}
          <div className="p-8">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-8">
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-pink-50 rounded-lg p-4 border border-purple-200">
                <div className="text-sm text-purple-600 font-medium mb-1">Quotation Number</div>
                <div className="text-xl font-bold text-purple-800">{quotation.quotation_number}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-50 to-red-50 rounded-lg p-4 border border-orange-200">
                <div className="text-sm text-orange-600 font-medium mb-1">Quotation Date</div>
                <div className="text-xl font-bold text-orange-800">{formatDate(quotation.created_at)}</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Summary Statistics */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-8">
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 rounded-lg p-4 text-center border border-blue-200">
                <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-blue-800">{quotation.rooms?.length || 0}</div>
                <div className="text-sm text-blue-600 font-medium">Total Rooms</div>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-emerald-50 rounded-lg p-4 text-center border border-green-200">
                <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-800">{quotation.rooms?.reduce((sum, room) => sum + room.items.length, 0) || 0}</div>
                <div className="text-sm text-green-600 font-medium">Total Products</div>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-violet-50 rounded-lg p-4 text-center border border-purple-200">
                <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-purple-800">{quotation.rooms?.reduce((sum, room) => sum + room.items.reduce((itemSum, item) => itemSum + (item.quantity_boxes || 0), 0), 0) || 0}</div>
                <div className="text-sm text-purple-600 font-medium">Total Boxes</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Detailed Products Table */}
          <div className="p-8">
            <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 text-slate-800 flex items-center">
              <div className="w-3 h-10 bg-gradient-to-b from-blue-600 to-indigo-700 rounded mr-4"></div>
              Detailed Product Specifications
            </h3>
            
            {quotation.rooms && quotation.rooms.length > 0 && quotation.rooms.some(room => room.items && room.items.length > 0) ? (
              <div className="space-y-6">
                {quotation.rooms.map((room, roomIndex) => (
                  <div key={roomIndex} className="border-2 border-gray-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-lg">
                    <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-700 to-slate-800 text-white p-4">
                      <h4 className="text-xl font-bold flex items-center">
                        <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-white rounded-full mr-3"></div>
                        Room {roomIndex + 1}: {room.room_name}
                      </h4>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                      <table className="w-full text-sm">
                        <thead>
                          <tr className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-700 text-white">
                            <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-left">Product Details</th>
                            <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-left">Size & Surface</th>
                            {quotation.show_sqft_in_box && (
                              <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-center">SQFT/Box</th>
                            )}
                            {quotation.show_sqft_needed && (
                              <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-center">SQFT Needed</th>
                            )}
                            {quotation.show_box_needed && (
                              <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-center">Boxes Needed</th>
                            )}
                            <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-center">Quantity</th>
                            {quotation.show_price_per_sqft && (
                              <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-right">Price/SQFT</th>
                            )}
                            {quotation.show_price_per_box && (
                              <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-right">Price/Box</th>
                            )}
                            {quotation.show_amount && (
                              <th className="font-semibold px-4 py-3 text-right">Amount</th>
                            )}
                          </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                          {room.items.map((item, itemIndex) => (
                            <tr key={itemIndex} className={itemIndex % 2 === 0 ? "bg-white" : "bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-50 to-blue-50"}>
                              <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top">
                                <div className="space-y-1">
                                  <div className="font-bold text-blue-900 text-base">{item.product?.design_name || 'Unknown Product'}</div>
                                  {item.product?.collection && (
                                    <div className="text-sm text-purple-600 font-medium">Collection: {item.product.collection}</div>
                                  )}
                                </div>
                              </td>
                              <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top">
                                <div className="space-y-1">
                                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-700">
                                    <span className="font-medium">Size:</span> {item.product?.size || '-'}
                                  </div>
                                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-700">
                                    <span className="font-medium">Surface:</span> {item.product?.surface || 'Standard'}
                                  </div>
                                </div>
                              </td>
                              {quotation.show_sqft_in_box && (
                                <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-center">
                                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-green-700">
                                    {quotation.sqft_in_box_type === 'actual'
                                      ? item.product?.actual_sqft_per_box.toFixed(2)
                                      : item.product?.billed_sqft_per_box.toFixed(2)
                                    }
                                  </div>
                                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">({quotation.sqft_in_box_type})</div>
                                </td>
                              )}
                              {quotation.show_sqft_needed && (
                                <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-center">
                                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-orange-700">{item.sqft_needed?.toFixed(2)}</div>
                                </td>
                              )}
                              {quotation.show_box_needed && (
                                <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-center">
                                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-purple-700">{item.box_needed?.toFixed(2)}</div>
                                </td>
                              )}
                              <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-center">
                                <div className="text-lg font-bold text-blue-800">{item.quantity_boxes}</div>
                                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">boxes</div>
                              </td>
                              {quotation.show_price_per_sqft && (
                                <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-right">
                                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-green-700">{formatCurrency(item.rate_per_sqft)}</div>
                                </td>
                              )}
                              {quotation.show_price_per_box && (
                                <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-right">
                                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-indigo-700">{formatCurrency(item.mrp_per_box)}</div>
                                </td>
                              )}
                              {quotation.show_amount && (
                                <td className="px-4 py-4 align-top text-right">
                                  <div className="text-base font-bold text-blue-900 bg-blue-50 px-2 py-1 rounded">
                                    {formatCurrency(item.amount || 0)}
                                  </div>
                                </td>
                              )}
                            </tr>
                          ))}
                        </tbody>
                      </table>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-center py-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-blue-50 rounded-lg border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300">
                <div className="text-6xl mb-4">📋</div>
                <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">No products added to this quotation</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Financial Summary */}
          <div className="p-8">
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-emerald-50 rounded-lg p-6 border border-green-200 max-w-md ml-auto">
              <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4 text-green-800 flex items-center">
                <div className="w-2 h-6 bg-green-600 rounded mr-3"></div>
                Financial Summary
              </h3>
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <div className="flex justify-between py-2 border-b border-green-200">
                  <span className="text-gray-700">Subtotal:</span>
                  <span className="font-semibold text-green-800">{formatCurrency(quotation.total_amount || 0)}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex justify-between py-2 border-b border-green-200">
                  <span className="text-gray-700">Round Off:</span>
                  <span className="font-semibold text-green-800">{formatCurrency(calculateRoundOff(quotation.total_amount || 0))}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex justify-between py-3 bg-green-100 rounded-lg px-3">
                  <span className="text-lg font-bold text-green-900">Grand Total:</span>
                  <span className="text-lg font-bold text-green-900">{formatCurrency(Math.round(quotation.total_amount || 0))}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Terms & Conditions */}
          <div className="p-8">
            <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4 text-slate-800 flex items-center">
              <div className="w-2 h-6 bg-orange-600 rounded mr-3"></div>
              Terms & Conditions
            </h3>
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-50 to-amber-50 p-6 rounded-lg border border-orange-200">
              <div className="text-gray-700 leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-wrap">
                {quotation.terms_conditions ? (
                  quotation.terms_conditions
                ) : (
                  <div className="text-gray-500 italic">
                    <p>• Prices are valid for 30 days from the quotation date</p>
                    <p>• Payment terms: 50% advance, balance before delivery</p>
                    <p>• Delivery timeline: 7-10 business days after confirmation</p>
                    <p>• Installation charges are not included unless specified</p>
                    <p>• Warranty: 10 years on manufacturing defects</p>
                    <p>• Returns accepted within 7 days in original packaging</p>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Footer */}
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-800 to-slate-900 text-white p-6 rounded-lg text-center mt-8">
              <p className="text-xl font-bold mb-2">Thank you for choosing our services!</p>
              <p className="text-slate-300 mb-4">We look forward to working with you on this project.</p>
              <div className="w-20 h-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-400 to-cyan-400 mx-auto rounded-full"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default PdfDetailedTemplate;
```

Perfect! I've simplified both the PDF export utility and the template. Here's what I've done to fix the blank PDF issue:

## Key Changes:

1. **Simplified PDF Export**:
   - Removed complex page break logic that was causing issues
   - Used a single, reliable method that captures the entire element
   - Added automatic page splitting when content is taller than A4
   - Increased wait time to 200ms for better rendering

2. **Removed Problematic Attributes**:
   - Removed all `data-page-break` attributes from the template
   - Removed `data-page-break-inside` attributes
   - Simplified the template structure

3. **Better Error Handling**:
   - Added comprehensive logging to track the process
   - Better cleanup of DOM elements
   - More robust error handling

## How It Works Now:

1. **Single Capture**: The entire quotation template is captured as one image
2. **Automatic Splitting**: If the content is taller than A4, it's automatically split into multiple pages
3. **Simple Logic**: No complex sectioning that could cause rendering issues

## Expected Result:

- The PDF should now generate successfully with content
- If the quotation is long, it will automatically split across multiple pages
- Each page will contain a portion of the content that fits within A4 dimensions

The console logs will show you exactly what's happening during the export process. Try generating the PDF now - it should work and show the actual content instead of blank pages.
